_comment: Amazon Appstore listing metadata — submit via https://developer.amazon.com/apps-and-games
title: EnigmAgent — AI Secret Vault
shortDescription: Local encrypted vault for AI agents. Zero cloud, zero accounts. AES-256-GCM.
longDescription:
EnigmAgent is an open-source, local-first secret vault built for AI agent developers and privacy-conscious power users.

The problem: AI agents need API keys, tokens, and passwords. Hardcoding them in prompts means they appear in LLM context windows, logs, and cloud services.

The solution: Store credentials in a local AES-256-GCM encrypted vault and reference them as {{PLACEHOLDER}} symbols. EnigmAgent resolves them at execution time — secrets never appear in plaintext outside the vault.

FEATURES:
★ AES-256-GCM encryption with Argon2id key derivation
★ {{PLACEHOLDER}} reference system — symbolic in prompts, real at execution
★ Integrates with LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, n8n, and 40+ AI frameworks
★ Domain-binding security model
★ Complete offline operation — no accounts, no cloud sync, no telemetry
★ Fire TV compatible

PERFECT FOR:
• AI/ML developers building agent workflows
• DevOps engineers managing deployment secrets
• Power users who want control over their credentials
